mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_role ( user_id, role_id, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, version ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.roleId}, 0, #{item.createBy}, NOW(), #{item.updateBy}, NOW(), #{item.remark}, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT ur.user_id, ur.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.data_scope, r.status as role_status FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT ur.role_id, ur.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.enabled as user_status FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ur.user_id = u.id WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId} AND ur.deleted = 0 AND u.deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO sys_user_role ( user_id, role_id, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, version ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.roleId}, 0, #{item.createBy}, NOW(), #{item.updateBy}, NOW(), #{item.remark}, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id as role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, COUNT(ur.user_id) as user_count FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id AND ur.deleted = 0 WHERE r.deleted = 0 GROUP BY r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name ORDER BY user_count DESC
